name: Close CRM
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Close Does

Close is often described as the Formula 1 car of CRMs because it prioritizes speed and high-volume sales activity. It is built around powerful calling and SMS features, automatic activity logging, and fast workflows that keep reps in motion without unnecessary clicks. If your agency has a team of closers who spend most of their day dialing leads to sell services like reputation management or SEO packages, Close is one of the best tools on this list for maximizing call efficiency and conversion rates.

Close also includes built-in email sequences, pipeline visibility, and reporting designed to support B2B sales teams that run heavy outbound and touch-based outreach.

Source: Close

​Key Features

  • ​Built-in Power Dialer: Reps can work through a list of 100 leads in record time without picking up a desk phone.
  • ​AI Enrich: Automatically pulls data like contact titles and company details directly into the record.
  • ​Activity Dashboards: Provides SDR and AE teams with real-time visibility into their calling and emailing performance.

​Benefits of Close CRM

  • ​Massive Productivity Boost: Teams frequently report higher call volume and more meetings booked after switching to Close, largely due to its built-in dialer and minimal data entry requirements.
  • ​Faster Response Times: Service companies benefit from faster response times with an integrated CRM.
  • Reduced Admin Work: Automatic call logging, email tracking, and activity capture eliminate manual CRM updates, allowing sales reps to spend more time selling.

​Pricing

  • Essentials Plan: $49/user/month
  • Growth Plan: $109/user/month
  • Scale: $149/user/month

​Pros

​✅ The fastest CRM for high-volume outbound sales.

✅ Incredible built-in calling and SMS capabilities.

​Cons

​🚫 No invoicing or payment processing.

🚫 Not designed for client management after the sale is closed.

‍
what_people_say:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Customers Say

“Close is incredibly intuitive — the ease of use is one of its biggest strengths. From day one, our team could navigate the platform without training, and it’s made daily tasks feel effortless.”

- Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.

‍
